---
title: "Time Series Final Report"
author: "Sihan Zhuang"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
source("../R/00_setup.R")
```

# Research Question

State the final research question and explain why it requires time series methods.

# Data

Describe the data source, variables, time span, sampling frequency, and any cleaning decisions.

# Exploratory Analysis

Summarise trend, seasonality, cycles, volatility, stationarity, and any transformations suggested by the data.

# Methods

Describe the candidate time series models considered. Include the final model equation and explain the estimation procedure used.

# Results

Present the selected model, parameter estimates, diagnostics, and evidence supporting the model choice.

# Forecasting or Inference

Report the forecast or statistical inference results required by the research question.

# Discussion

Discuss limitations, uncertainty, and whether the selected model answers the research question adequately.

# References

Add references used for data, methods, and model interpretation.
